description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8) and platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) in parallel. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with poetry, run tests and linters, and upload coverage to Codecov on Linux.
